meta.title: Wif-Me | Umrah Worship Companion Platform
meta.description: A multi-service marketplace for personal muthawif, muthawif providers, transportation, visa processing, and supporting services for independent Umrah pilgrims.

hero.description: Wif-Me connects independent Umrah pilgrims with personal muthawif, providers, route-based transportation, visa processing, and supporting services in a verified ecosystem.

searchBox.title: Which service do you want to prepare?
searchBox.description: Choose a starting point. Trip details can be completed in the next step.
searchBox.label: Service type
searchBox.note: No registration fee. Payment is processed when booking.

services.title: Wif-Me core business in one journey flow.
services.description: Each service can stand alone, but they are designed to connect so worship preparation stays organized.

items.title: Personal Muthawif
items.desc: Book a verified individual worship guide for independent pilgrims, families, or small groups.

items.title: Muthawif Provider
items.desc: B2B cooperation for travel agencies, communities, and organizations that need reliable muthawif supply.

items.title: Transportation
items.desc: Route-based vehicle rental for airports, Makkah, Madinah, ziyarat, and intercity travel.

items.title: Visa Processing
items.desc: Umrah visa and supporting document handling with trackable process status.

workflow.title: A companion platform that keeps pilgrim and provider flows clear.
workflow.description: From service selection to transaction completion, every process is made easy to track.

items.title: Choose services
items.desc: Define your needs: muthawif, provider, transportation, visa, or additional services.

items.title: Compare providers
items.desc: Review profiles, experience, prices, display currency, and schedule availability.

items.title: Book & escrow
items.desc: Orders are processed with secure payment and trackable service status.

about.title: Built for a verified worship ecosystem.
about.description: Wif-Me is not only a place to find a muthawif. It acts as an intermediary between pilgrims, muthawif, providers, and admins to make worship assistance more transparent.
about.verseMeaning: And complete the Hajj and Umrah for Allah.

features.title: Verified Ecosystem
features.desc: Muthawif and providers go through document, experience, and service eligibility checks.

features.title: Escrow Payment
features.desc: Funds are held until services run as agreed, protecting both pilgrims and providers.

features.title: Multi-Currency
features.desc: Prices can be displayed in IDR, SAR, and USD for clearer booking decisions.

features.title: Connected Services
features.desc: Muthawif, transportation, visa, and additional needs can be arranged in one plan.

roles.title: Pilgrim
roles.desc: Find and book worship assistance services safely.

roles.title: Muthawif
roles.desc: Offer personal services, manage schedules, and receive bookings.

roles.title: Provider
roles.desc: Manage B2B services for groups, travel agencies, and organizations.

join.title: Start as a pilgrim, muthawif, or provider
join.description: Choose the role that fits you. Service providers will complete verification before receiving orders.

cards.title: I am a Pilgrim
cards.desc: Find worship assistance, transportation, visa, and additional needs in one platform.

cards.title: I am a Provider
cards.desc: Register your service as a personal muthawif or provider for pilgrims and B2B cooperation.

cta.title: Worship preparation, better organized
cta.description: Arrange independent Umrah service needs from one safe and verified place.

footer.description: A multi-service platform that connects independent Umrah pilgrims with worship assistance service providers.
